headline: RS2 CEO gives card issuing unit two years to prove fintech model works
summary: Investing.com -- RS2 Chief Executive Radi El Haj said investors should expect clear proof of a profitable card issuing business within two years, as the Maltese payments infrastructure firm tracks take rates and contribution margins to validate its push into direct competition with fintechs.

content.title: RS2 CEO gives card issuing unit two years to prove fintech model works
content.summary: Investing.com -- RS2 Chief Executive Radi El Haj said investors should expect clear proof of a profitable card issuing business within two years, as the Maltese payments infrastructure firm tracks take rates and contribution margins to validate its push into direct competition with fintechs.
